name: Godawari Power & Ispat Limited
summary: Godawari Power & Ispat Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells steel products primarily in India. The company offers various products, such as iron ore pellets, sponge iron, iron and steel billets, MS rounds, steel wires, HB wires, wire rods, silico manganese, fly ash bricks, and ferro alloys. It is also involved in the generation and sale of solar power and iron ore mining activities. The company was formerly known as Ispat Godawari Ltd. Godawari Power & Ispat Limited was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Raipur, India.
